title: Roles and Ownership — the org chart shown through access
description: An org chart shows a company as boxes of titles. The Foundry shows the same company through access: which governed boxes a role can act in. Different roles have different gravity across the five boxes.
principles: Primary ownership is not exclusive permission.
Most roles touch adjacent boxes too.
Reference / evidence cuts across every level.
Users should see role-based tools, not the whole backend ontology.

roles.responsibility: sets strategic direction and long-term intent

access_model.note: Access is which boxes a role can act in — not a job title. Where access and responsibility disagree, the Foundry exposes the mismatch.
